speaker: Ren
text: This bridge is nothing but rubble. There's no way across.

speaker: Solen
text: In this timeline, the bridge has long since crumbled beyond repair. But what is broken in the future... can still be mended in the past.

speaker: Ren
text: You mean Mira? She can fix this from her side?

speaker: Solen
text: If she restores the bridge in the past, its echo will carry forward through time. Have faith in her, as she has faith in you.
